data.body:
Goal:
Restore the launcher behavior so `foolery start` acts as a pure server start and `foolery restart` no longer opens the browser implicitly. Keep `foolery open` as the explicit browser-opening path, and align help text with the behavior.

Verification:
1. Inspect `scripts/install.sh` and confirm `start_cmd` no longer calls `open_browser`, while `open_cmd` still does.
2. Run `bun install --frozen-lockfile` in the dedicated worktree, then run `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build` successfully from that worktree.

Constraints:
Do not introduce any new browser-opening path for `start` or `restart`. Keep the explicit `open` command behavior intact.
data.title: Restore no-browser start
